name: Way of the Exploding Fist
description: Way of the Exploding Fist is a one-on-one martial arts combat game set against a backdrop of serene dojo settings. The game features two fighters, each controlled independently, engaging in hand-to-hand combat. The goal is to deplete your opponent's health bar to zero by executing a variety of punches, kicks, and blocks. Each move has a different impact on the opponent's health, with certain combinations and well-timed attacks dealing greater damage. Successful blocks mitigate damage. Characters are generally static on the x axis, but can leap forward to close the gap or backwards to create space. The fighters are capable of different stances, which affect the execution and properties of their attacks. Victory is achieved when the opponent's health is fully depleted, or time runs out, and you have more health. The game is designed to be precise and timing-based, rewarding skilled players who can anticipate their opponent's moves and react accordingly.
